reason: To set the runtime status of the net.ipv4.conf.all.accept_redirects kernel parameter to 0 to disable accepting ICMP redirects for all IPv4 interfaces, making the setting persistent via /etc/sysctl.d.
estimated_impact: networking affected; ICMP redirect acceptance may allow attackers to redirect traffic; Potential for man-in-the-middle attacks; Could be used to bypass network restrictions
